title: Young Franky and Iceburg
description: Tom’s work, the judicial pressure against him, and the Sea Train project connect Water Seven’s past to the present crisis.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Blueno, Rob Lucci, Paulie, Franky, Tom. Tom’s work, the judicial pressure against him, and the Sea Train project connect Water Seven’s past to the present crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: I'm getting you out of here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: How can you with those wounds!!?

summary: Tom’s work, the judicial pressure against him, and the Sea Train project connect Water Seven’s past to the present crisis.
